name: Puntland (Somalia)

colors.symbolism: the central stripe — the Somali field

description: Three horizontal stripes — light blue (broad central), with thin white stripes above and below, and green stripes at the top and bottom — charged with a white five-pointed star centred on the blue, and Arabic script.
history: Puntland is an autonomous region of Somalia in the northeast (Horn of Africa) declared in 1998. The flag mirrors the broader Somali flag (the central blue with white star) but adds green stripes for Islam and Puntland's specific identity.
